title: 07893_Hybrid2_Neural_ODE_Causal_Modeling_and_an_Application_to_Glycemic_Response
positive_examples: Ranking an expert-provided list of possible interventions that are assumed to be safe alternatives
Potentially improving clinical decision-making in type 1 diabetes management
negative_examples: Risk of clinicians relying on the system's recommendations blindly
Potential for life-threatening hypoglycemia if too much insulin is recommended
